category.scope_note: Home and clinical medical device comparison.

title.en: China-to-EU Medical Device Compliance Gap Matrix
title.zh: 中国医疗器械进入欧盟：合规差距矩阵
title.zht: 中國醫療器材進入歐盟：合規差距矩陣

description.en: Public-interest, source-linked comparison of common China home and clinical medical device documentation against EU MDR 2017/745 conformity, Notified Body, EU Authorised Representative, EUDAMED, UDI, ISO 13485, and electrical-safety expectations.
description.zh: 公益性、带来源链接的中国家用/临床医疗器械文件与欧盟 MDR 2017/745 合格评定、公告机构、欧盟授权代表、EUDAMED、UDI、ISO 13485 和电气安全要求差距对照。
description.zht: 公益性、附來源連結的中國家用/臨床醫療器材文件與歐盟 MDR 2017/745 合格評定、公告機構、歐盟授權代表、EUDAMED、UDI、ISO 13485 和電氣安全要求差距對照。

disclaimer.en: This page is an informational comparison aid, not a certification decision, legal opinion, CE conformity assessment, Notified Body opinion, clinical evaluation, QMS audit result, customs determination, or market-access approval. Exporters, importers, and manufacturers should verify current EU MDR classification, conformity-assessment, authorised-representative, registration, UDI, post-market, labelling, and importer obligations with qualified professionals before shipment or placing on the market.
disclaimer.zh: 本页仅为信息性对照工具，不构成认证结论、法律意见、CE 合格评定、公告机构意见、临床评价、质量体系审核结果、海关裁定或市场准入批准。出口商、进口商和制造商在出货或投放市场前应与合格专业人士核验现行欧盟 MDR 分类、合格评定、授权代表、注册、UDI、上市后、标签和进口商义务。
disclaimer.zht: 本頁僅為資訊性對照工具，不構成認證結論、法律意見、CE 合格評定、公告機構意見、臨床評價、品質系統審核結果、海關裁定或市場准入批准。出口商、進口商和製造商在出貨或投放市場前應與合格專業人士核驗現行歐盟 MDR 分類、合格評定、授權代表、註冊、UDI、上市後、標籤和進口商義務。

answer_first.en: EU MDR 2017/745 conformity, usually through a Notified Body, an EU Authorised Representative, EUDAMED and UDI obligations, and ISO 13485 QMS evidence are the main gaps beyond NMPA; IEC 60601 safety largely transfers from GB 9706.
answer_first.zh: 欧盟 MDR 2017/745 合格评定（通常需公告机构）、欧盟授权代表、EUDAMED 与 UDI 义务以及 ISO 13485 质量体系证明，是 NMPA 之外的主要差距；IEC 60601 安全要求大体可从 GB 9706 转移。
answer_first.zht: 歐盟 MDR 2017/745 合格評定（通常需公告機構）、歐盟授權代表、EUDAMED 與 UDI 義務以及 ISO 13485 品質系統證明，是 NMPA 之外的主要差距；IEC 60601 安全要求大體可從 GB 9706 轉移。

editorial_controls.source_policy: Official regulator, standards body, notified body, harmonized-standard source, customs, or primary legal source preferred. Local PDFs are not accepted.
editorial_controls.change_control: Rows must include publisher, official URL, access date, verification flag, and last_verified before human_reviewed can be true.
